data.title: As an agent, I can commit without local enforcement gates blocking my workflow
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Remove all local enforcement hooks (pre-commit test gate, pre-commit review gate, PreToolUse bypass detection) and simplify the commit workflow to non-blocking fast-feedback only.
**Why**: With CI enforcement operational (Epic 3aaa-0238), local gates are redundant. Removing them eliminates timeout workarounds, diff hash verification friction, and Layer 2 bypass detection latency.
**Scope**:
- IN: Remove pre-commit-test-gate.sh, pre-commit-review-gate.sh, review-gate.sh (PreToolUse), and their .pre-commit-config.yaml entries (lockstep, same commit). Remove associated artifact files and producers (review-status, test-gate-status, record-test-status.sh Step 3.5 from COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md). Update review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh patterns or remove from pre-bash.sh dispatcher. Remove or update review-integrity-guard.sh. Remove 15+ test files that test removed hooks and their .test-index entries. Update COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md to non-blocking fast-feedback (warnings only).
- OUT: merge-to-main.sh rewrite (Story 2), CLAUDE.md Critical Rules rewrites (Story 3), REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md updates (Story 3)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the commit workflow runs tests, lint, and format for fast feedback but does not block on failures — no review gate or test gate enforcement locally
  ← Satisfies: "local commit workflow retains tests, lint, format as non-blocking Bash steps"
- When this story is complete, pre-commit-test-gate.sh, pre-commit-review-gate.sh, review-gate.sh (PreToolUse), and their .pre-commit-config.yaml entries are removed in a single commit with no hook-not-found errors
  ← Satisfies: "pre-commit test gate hook, review gate hook, and .pre-commit-config.yaml entries removed in lockstep"
- When this story is complete, review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh patterns that protect test-gate-status and review-status are removed or disabled, and the pre-bash.sh dispatcher no longer sources bypass detection for non-existent gates
  ← Satisfies: "PreToolUse hooks that enforce no-verify restrictions removed"
- When this story is complete, COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 3.5 (record-test-status.sh) is removed, eliminating unnecessary test recording on every commit
  ← Satisfies: "local commit workflow retains tests, lint, format as non-blocking Bash steps"
- When this story is complete, all test files testing removed hooks (15+ files) and their .test-index entries are removed in the same commit
  ← Satisfies: "pre-commit test gate hook, review gate hook removed"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Shared State] record-review.sh and REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md still write review-status after gate removal. Decide: keep as observability-only or remove as dead code. If removing, update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Steps 0 and 5, sprint SKILL.md review-status reference, and health-check.sh.
- [Shared State] record-test-status.sh becomes dead code — its only consumer (pre-commit-test-gate.sh) is removed. COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 3.5 adds significant time to every commit for no enforcement benefit.
- [Consumer Impact] review-integrity-guard.sh blocks writes to review-status. With review gate removed, the guard protects a file nothing enforces. Decide: remove or keep for review workflow integrity.
- [Consumer Impact] 15+ test files directly test removed hooks. Tests and .test-index entries must be removed in same commit to avoid CI failures and epic closure blocks.
- [Testing] Remaining pre-commit hooks (format, lint, portability, shim check) must continue working after test/review gate removal.

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
